commands.title: Simple LSP Client: List Configured Servers
Simple LSP Client: List Configured Formatters

simpleLspClient.servers.markdownDescription: Named LSP servers to start. Each key is a server name.

cmd.markdownDescription: Command and arguments used to start the LSP server over stdio. Supports `${workspaceFolder}`, `${workspaceFolderBasename}`, `${cwd}`, `${userHome}`, `${pathSeparator}`, and `${execPath}` placeholders.

filetypes.markdownDescription: VS Code language IDs this LSP server should attach to.

env.markdownDescription: Environment variables to add or override for the server process. Values support `${workspaceFolder}`, `${workspaceFolderBasename}`, `${cwd}`, `${userHome}`, `${pathSeparator}`, and `${execPath}` placeholders.

initializationOptions.markdownDescription: JSON value passed to the server as LSP initializationOptions.

formatting.markdownDescription: Controls LSP formatting from this server. `true` enables it, `false` suppresses it, and `onlyWhenNoFormatter` suppresses it when an external formatter is configured for one of the same filetypes.

simpleLspClient.formatters.markdownDescription: Named stdin/stdout formatters to register. Each key is a formatter name.

cmd.markdownDescription: Command and arguments used to format stdin into stdout. Supports `${workspaceFolder}`, `${workspaceFolderBasename}`, `${cwd}`, `${userHome}`, `${pathSeparator}`, `${execPath}`, `${file}`, `${relativeFile}`, and `${filetype}` placeholders.

filetypes.markdownDescription: VS Code language IDs this formatter should attach to.

env.markdownDescription: Environment variables to add or override for the formatter process. Values support `${workspaceFolder}`, `${workspaceFolderBasename}`, `${cwd}`, `${userHome}`, `${pathSeparator}`, `${execPath}`, `${file}`, `${relativeFile}`, and `${filetype}` placeholders.

simpleLspClient.formatterTimeoutMs.markdownDescription: Formatter process timeout in milliseconds. Set to 0 to disable the timeout.

scripts.compile: npm run typecheck && npm run bundle
scripts.format: prettier --write package.json package-lock.json tsconfig.json eslint.config.mjs .prettierrc.json README.md STATUS.md examples/**/*.json src/**/*.ts
scripts.format:check: prettier --check package.json package-lock.json tsconfig.json eslint.config.mjs .prettierrc.json README.md STATUS.md examples/**/*.json src/**/*.ts
